initial_draft:

```
<my name> BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1 / 4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> Player RED is offering 15 dollars for free. I have nothing to lose and everything to gain. Accepting is the best strategy here. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message>Accepting the trade. Looking forward to having some dollars! </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
```
